import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx");import { Fragment, jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";

  EyeOff,
  Building2,

const mockIncidents = [

export default function IncidentManager({
  role = "org-admin",
  userId = "staff-003",
  userFacilities = ["fac-001", "fac-005"]
}) {
  _s();
  const [incidents, setIncidents] = useState(mockIncidents);
  const [showCreateModal, setShowCreateModal] = useState(false);
  const [showWorkflowModal, setShowWorkflowModal] = useState(false);
  const [showDetailModal, setShowDetailModal] = useState(false);
  const [selectedIncident, setSelectedIncident] = useState(null);
  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState("all");
  const [filterSensitivity, setFilterSensitivity] = useState("all");
  const [showSensitiveData, setShowSensitiveData] = useState({});
  const [showFilters, setShowFilters] = useState(false);
  const canViewIncident = (incident) => {
    if (role === "org-admin") return true;
    if (!incident.visibleToRoles.includes(role)) return false;
    if (role === "facility-manager" && incident.facilityId) {
      if (!userFacilities?.includes(incident.facilityId)) return false;
    }
    if (incident.restrictedAccess) {
      if (role === "compliance-manager") return true;
      if (incident.authorizedViewers?.includes(userId)) return true;
      return false;
    }
    return true;
  };
  const canViewSensitiveData = (incident) => {
    if (role === "org-admin") return true;
    if (role === "compliance-manager") return true;
    if (incident.sensitivityLevel === "public") return true;
    if (role === "facility-manager" && incident.sensitivityLevel === "confidential" && incident.facilityId && userFacilities?.includes(incident.facilityId)) {
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  };
  const visibleIncidents = incidents.filter((inc) => canViewIncident(inc));
  const filteredIncidents = visibleIncidents.filter((inc) => {
    if (filterStatus !== "all" && inc.status !== filterStatus) return false;
    if (filterSensitivity !== "all" && inc.sensitivityLevel !== filterSensitivity) return false;
    return true;
  });
  const statusCounts = {
    open: visibleIncidents.filter((i) => i.status === "open").length,
    investigating: visibleIncidents.filter((i) => i.status === "investigating").length,
    escalated: visibleIncidents.filter((i) => i.status === "escalated").length,
    closed: visibleIncidents.filter((i) => i.status === "closed").length
  };
  const handleCreateIncident = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const form = e.target;
    const newIncident = {
      id: `INC-2025-${String(incidents.length + 43).padStart(3, "0")}`,
      type: form.incidentType.value,
      severity: form.severity.value,
      status: "open",
      location: form.location.value,
      reporter: "Current User",
      assignedTo: "Unassigned",
      description: form.description.value,
      createdAt: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toLocaleString(),
      updatedAt: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toLocaleString(),
      sensitivityLevel: form.sensitivityLevel.value,
      visibleToRoles: ["org-admin", "compliance-manager"],
      restrictedAccess: form.restrictedAccess.checked
    };
    setIncidents([newIncident, ...incidents]);
    setShowCreateModal(false);
    form.reset();
  };
  const toggleSensitiveData = (incidentId) => {
    setShowSensitiveData((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      [incidentId]: !prev[incidentId]
    }));
  };
  const getSensitivityBadge = (level) => {
    const config = {
      public: { bg: "bg-blue-500/20", text: "text-blue-400", icon: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: Users, _fgS: "chrj0", _fgB: 1779104383545, className: "w-3 h-3", "data-fg-chrj0": "418.256:418.40688:/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx:291:68:10305:29:e:Users::::::DV8M" }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx",
        lineNumber: 311,
        columnNumber: 68
      }, this) },
      confidential: {
        bg: "bg-amber-500/20",
        text: "text-amber-400",
        icon: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: Lock, _fgS: "chrj1", _fgB: 1779104383545, className: "w-3 h-3", "data-fg-chrj1": "418.256:418.40688:/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx:295:15:10437:28:e:Lock::::::D0Cv" }, void 0, false, {
          fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx",
          lineNumber: 315,
          columnNumber: 15
        }, this)
      },
      restricted: {
        bg: "bg-orange-500/20",
        text: "text-orange-400",
        icon: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: Shield, _fgS: "chrj2", _fgB: 1779104383545, className: "w-3 h-3", "data-fg-chrj2": "418.256:418.40688:/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx:300:15:10575:30:e:Shield::::::B8zf" }, void 0, false, {
          fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx",
          lineNumber: 320,
          columnNumber: 15
        }, this)
      },
      sensitive: {
        bg: "bg-red-500/20",
        text: "text-red-400",
        icon: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: AlertTriangle, _fgS: "chrj3", _fgB: 1779104383545, className: "w-3 h-3", "data-fg-chrj3": "418.256:418.40688:/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx:305:15:10708:37:e:AlertTriangle::::::Ruk" }, void 0, false, {
          fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx",
          lineNumber: 325,
          columnNumber: 15
        }, this)
      }
    };
    const c = config[level] || config.public;
    return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "span", _fgS: "chrj4", _fgB: 1779104383545, className: `px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium ${c.bg} ${c.text} flex items-center gap-1`, "data-fg-chrj4": "418.256:418.40688:/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx:310:7:10851:147:e:span:xtx", children: [
      c.icon,
      level
    ] }, void 0, true, {
      fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx",
      lineNumber: 330,
      columnNumber: 7
    }, this);
  };
  const sensitiveIncidentsCount = visibleIncidents.filter(
    (i) => i.sensitivityLevel === "sensitive" || i.sensitivityLevel === "restricted"
  ).length;
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "chrj7", _fgB: 1779104383545, _fgD: true, className: "space-y-6", "data-fg-chrj7": "418.256:418.40688:/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx:323:5:11225:27710:e:div:xtetxtxtxtetxtetxtxtxtetxtxtxtxtxtx:1", children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "chrj9", _fgB: 1779104383545, className: "flex items-center justify-between", "data-fg-chrj9": "418.256:418.40688:/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx:325:7:11280:1628:e:div:ete", children: [
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "chrj10", _fgB: 1779104383545, "data-fg-chrj10": "418.256:418.40688:/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx:326:9:11340:851:e:div:ete", children: [
        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "chrj11", _fgB: 1779104383545, className: "flex items-center gap-3 mb-2", "data-fg-chrj11": "418.256:418.40688:/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx:327:11:11356:618:e:div:etx", children: [

            fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx",
            lineNumber: 348,
            columnNumber: 13
          }, this),
          role !== "org-admin" && /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "span", _fgS: "chrj15", _fgB: 1779104383545, className: "px-3 py-1 bg-purple-500/20 border border-purple-500/30 text-purple-400 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center gap-2", "data-fg-chrj15": "418.256:418.40688:/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx:330:15:11536:406:e:span:etx", children: [
            /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: Shield, _fgS: "chrj16", _fgB: 1779104383545, className: "w-4 h-4", "data-fg-chrj16": "418.256:418.40688:/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx:331:17:11685:30:e:Shield::::::B8zf" }, void 0, false, {
              fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/IncidentManager.tsx",
              lineNumber: 351,

            role === "compliance-manager" ? "Compliance View" : role === "facility-manager" ? "Facility View" : "Limited View"

                  FGCmp,

  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
